authors.author: Matt Redman
Matt Redman
In aller Welt erklingt dieses Lied

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All over the world, all over the world Your Spirit is moving all over the world Your river is flowing, Your presence has come Your Spirit is moving all over the world.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You’re touching the nations You’re bringing your love Your Spirit is moving all over the world

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All over the world, all over the world Your Spirit is moving all over the world Your banner is lifted, Your praises are sung Your Spirit is moving all over the world

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Divisions are falling, Your making us one You’re Spirit is moving all over the world.
